title: lexer-token-cache-included-ranges-parity
description: Fix lexToken/parser lexing parity gaps affecting reuse and recovery: error-mode lex loop behavior, cache key/value parity for last external token + reuse, and included-range interactions. Acceptance: regression tests around cache invalidation with external scanners, reuse toggles, and included-range transitions. REQUIRED DOC UPDATE: after completion, update docs/c-go-mismatches-checklist.md entries for ts_parser__lex, ts_parser__get_cached_token, ts_parser__set_cached_token, and included-range-related mismatch notes with commit reference.
